Surname.jp: 自然を愛でる森の番人

description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52281_0]</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52281_0]</color>UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52281_0]</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52282_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52282_0]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使自身的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52282_0]\n回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Poisoned</color> on a selected target for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52283_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、選択した対象単体に<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52283_0]ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 선택한 대상 한 명에게 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52283_0]턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并对1名所选目标造成<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52283_0]回合</color>。
